description: Detects magic string comparisons in Java via .equals() and .equalsIgnoreCase() with string literals. Simplified from Rust: flags all method_invocation nodes. Cannot filter to only equals/equalsIgnoreCase with string-literal arguments, skip empty/single-char strings, or detect reversed equals/switch-case/contains patterns.

flag.message: method call with string literal argument detected -- verify this is not a magic string comparison (consider defining a named constant)
